(a) A municipality may assess against owners of abutting property who will specially benefit from lighting improvements the entire cost, including labor and material, of installing the improvements.

(b) A municipality may impose a lien against abutting property to secure the payment of the assessment against that property.

(c) Costs may not be assessed against any property or property owner and personal liability for costs may not be finally determined until after the hearing under Section 315.066 (Hearing) and the adjustment of equities between or among abutting property owners under Section 315.063 (Adjustment of Equities) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.061 — Authority to Assess Costs

(a) A municipality may assess against owners of abutting property who will specially benefit from lighting improvements the entire cost, including labor and material, of installing the improvements.

(b) A municipality may impose a lien against abutting property to secure the payment of the assessment against that property.

(c) Costs may not be assessed against any property or property owner and personal liability for costs may not be finally determined until after the hearing under Section 315.066 (Hearing) and the adjustment of equities between or among abutting property owners under Section 315.063 (Adjustment of Equities) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A municipality may assess against owners of abutting property who will specially benefit from lighting improvements the entire cost, including labor and material, of installing the improvements.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A municipality may impose a lien against abutting property to secure the payment of the assessment against that property.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Costs may not be assessed against any property or property owner and personal liability for costs may not be finally determined until after the hearing under Section 315.066 (Hearing) and the adjustment of equities between or among abutting property owners under Section 315.063 (Adjustment of Equities) .
